name: Pineapple-Peach Dipping Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Can (about 8 oz) crushed pineapple in juice, undrained
1/2 tsp grated fresh ginger OR 1/4 tsp ground ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the undrained pineapple, glaze, and ginger.
2. Cover; refrigerate until serving time.
3. Use sauce as a dip for hot egg rolls or chicken nuggets or use to baste chicken or ribs during broiling or grilling.
4. Makes about 1 1/2 cups sauce.
